title: larix laricina
intro: Larix laricina, also known as the tamarack or eastern larch, is a deciduous coniferous tree native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Larix laricina include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves that can be made by infusing the needles in hot water or oil, and can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
